---
title: "Reza Hakimazar"
subtitle: "Research Psychology M.Sc. Student"
image: images/me.jpg
about: 
   template: trestles
   image-shape: rounded
   image-width: 15em
   links:
      - text: Email
        icon: envelope
        href: mailto:reza.hakimazar@uni-hamburg.de
      - text: X
        icon: twitter-x
        href: https://x.com/rhakimazar/
      - text: GitHub
        icon: github
        href: https://github.com/rezahakimazar/
      - text: LinkedIn
        icon: linkedin
        href: https://linkedin.com/in/reza-hakimazar-55186a23b/
toc: false
---

# {{< fa address-card >}} About

I am a master's student in **research psychology** at the **University of Hamburg**, currently working under the supervision of [**Dr. Lennart Wittkuhn**](https://lennartwittkuhn.com/) on developing **Findable**, **Accessible**, **Interoperable**, and **Reusable (FAIR)** teaching materials.

My academic interests include **social psychology**, **cultural psychology**, and **science communication**. Recently, I have also been focusing on improving my skills in **quantitative research methods in psychology**. [**Here**](https://castbox.fm/channel/%D8%AC%D8%B9%D8%A8%D9%87-%D8%A7%D8%B3%DA%A9%DB%8C%D9%86%D8%B1-%7C-Skinner-Box-id6077186?country=us)**,** you can listen to my podcast (it is in Persian).
